# Strip footing (B1 => x-axis)


## Load combinations

```{julia}
uls_cases = vcat(101:199) #uls cases
permissible_cases = vcat(201:204) # PERMISSIBLE cases

# excel file output from SG model reactions
filename = "\\xlsx\\reactions.xlsx"
current_dir = dirname(@__FILE__)
filepathname = current_dir * filename;
```

## Standard pedestal, SQ460

```{julia}
b = 460mm
D = b
db = 16mm
Ab = π / 4 * db^2
n_all_around = 4

dtie = 10mm # assume 2 ties only
Asv_per_tiespacing = 2 * π / 4 * dtie^2 / 300mm |> mm^2 / mm

d = D - 50mm - 1.5 * db - dtie
fc = 32MPa
fy = 500MPa
rc_sq500 = AS3600RectSection(n_all_around, Ab, b, d, D, fc, fy, Asv_per_tiespacing)
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
rc_sq500.concrete_section.plot_section(filename="images/sq500.png");
```

![](images/sq500.png)


## Reinforced 300 slab, N16-200; moment capacity

```{julia}
D = 300mm
γc = 24.0kN / m^3;
db = 16mm;
Ast = π / 4 * db^2;
# cover to centre of rebar
cc = 50mm + 1.5 * db;
d = D - cc;
# shear ties
Asv_per_tiespacing = 0.0mm;

# define slab, per bar spacing
rc_slab = AS3600RectSection(fc=fc, fy=fy, b=1m, d=d, D=D, nbb=5, Abb=Ast);
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false
rc_slab.concrete_section.plot_section(filename="images/rc_slab.png");
```

![](images/rc_slab.png){width="300"}

```{julia}
Mdes_rc_slab, str_o = fdesign_beam_moment(rc_slab)
println(str_o)
```


### Foundation parameters

```{julia}  
sp = 0.7m
ae = 0.9m
B1 = sp + 2 * ae
B2 = 1.0m

D = rc_slab.D
Df = 1.0m # depth to footing underside
hs = Df - D # height of soil overburden 
hp = Df - D + 300mm # height of pedestal

# pedestal location 
e11 = -B1 / 2 + ae
e12 = e11 + sp

ped11 = RectanglePedestal(rc_sq500, hp, e11; nodenum=1)
ped12 = RectanglePedestal(rc_sq500, hp, e12; nodenum=5)

slab = FootingSlab(B1, B2, D);
vped = [ped11, ped12]
raft = RaftFootingRect(vped, slab, Df)
fg = plot_footing_geom(raft)
```


## Soil parameters

```{julia}
# allowable bearing
q_all = 100kPa
# WEIGHT OF SOIL
γs = 18.0kN / m^3;

ϕn = 1.0
ϕd = 0.9
ϕuϕ = 0.85
ϕsoilbase = 30.0°;
ϕfill = 30°;

backfill = Soil_AS4678(γs, ϕfill, ϕn, ϕd, ϕuϕ);
foundation = Soil_AS4678(γs, ϕsoilbase, ϕn, ϕd, ϕuϕ);
```


## ULS bearing pressure 

```{julia}
res = fraft_global_analysis(filepathname, uls_cases, raft, backfill, ψG=0.9, isZup=true, isFrustumVol=true,
    e_lim_11=300mm,
    e_lim_22=300mm)

calc_res, diagram = check_bearing_from_results(res, raft, uls_cases)
println(calc_res.calc_details)
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false
diagram
```

## SLS bearing pressure

```{julia}
pqx11, pqx22, calcdetails_qmax = check_bearing_pressure(filepathname, raft, backfill, permissible_cases,
    isZup=true,
    ψG=0.9,
    isFrustumVol=false);
pqx11
```

```{julia}
pqx22
```

```{julia}
println(calcdetails_qmax)
```

## ULS sliding check

```{julia}
str_out = check_sliding(filepathname, raft, backfill, foundation, uls_cases, isZup=true,
    isAdhesion=false,
    Gext=0.0kN,
    withPassive=true,
    isFrustumVol=true);
println(str_out)
```

### Moment diagram

```{julia}
calc_res, diagram_m = check_moment_diagram_from_results(res_bearing, raft, backfill; ψG=0.9, isFrustumVol=true, inc=0.01m, is_plot_all=true)
diagram_m
```

### Shear diagram

```{julia}
calc_res, diagram_v = check_shear_diagram_from_results(res_bearing, raft, backfill; ψG=0.9, isFrustumVol=true, inc=0.01m, is_plot_all=true)
diagram_v
```


## Punching Shear

```{julia}
str_o = check_punching(raft, uls_cases, ; isZup=true, filepathname=filepathname)
println(str_o)
```


## Pedestal beam shear

```{julia}
str = check_pedestal_shear(filepathname, raft, uls_cases, ; isZup=true)
println(str)
```


# latest strip footing

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| 
uls_cases = vcat(101:199) #uls cases
permissible_cases = vcat(201:204) # PERMISSIBLE cases

# excel file output from SG model reactions
filename_flot = "\\csv\\25068stcal0011_cable_ladder_flotcells.XLSX"
current_dir = dirname(@__FILE__)
filepathname_flot = current_dir * filename_flot;
```

#### Soil parameters

```{julia}
# allowable bearing
q_all = 100kPa
# WEIGHT OF SOIL
γs = 18.0kN / m^3;

ϕn = 1.0
ϕd = 0.9
ϕuϕ = 0.85
ϕsoilbase = 30.0°;
ϕfill = 30°;

backfill = Soil_AS4678(γs, ϕfill, ϕn, ϕd, ϕuϕ);
foundation = Soil_AS4678(γs, ϕsoilbase, ϕn, ϕd, ϕuϕ);
```

#### Reinforced slab, N12-200 

```{julia}
fc = 32MPa
fy = 500MPa
D = 250mm
γc = 24.0kN / m^3;
db = 10mm;
Ast = π / 4 * db^2;
# cover to centre of rebar
cc = 50mm + 1.5 * db;
d = D - cc;
# shear ties
Asv_per_tiespacing = 0.0mm;

# define slab, per bar spacing
rc_slab_flot = AS3600RectSection(fc=fc, fy=fy, b=1m, d=d, D=D, nbb=5, Abb=Ast);
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false
rc_slab_flot.concrete_section.plot_section(filename="images/flotation_area/rc_slab_flot.png");
```

![](images/flotation_area/rc_slab_flot.png){width="300"}

```{julia}
Mdes_rc_slab_flot, str_o = fdesign_beam_moment(rc_slab_flot, isIgnoreMinAst=true)
println(str_o)
```

#### Foundation parameters

```{julia}
ae1 = 300mm  # ped1 offset from left edge of footing
B1 = 1200mm
e11 = -B1 / 2 + ae1
e12 = e11 + 215mm

ae2 = 0.6m
sp2 = 4483mm
B2 = 2 * ae2 + sp2
e21 = B2 / 2 - ae2
e22 = -B2 / 2 + ae2

D = rc_slab_flot.D
Df = D              # depth to footing underside
hs = 0.0m           # height of soil overburden 

# pedestal 
dp = 600mm
hp = 300mm
rc_circ600_1 = CircularPedestal(dp, hp, e11, e21; nodenum=54)  # north side
rc_circ600_2 = CircularPedestal(dp, hp, e12, e22; nodenum=54)  # south side

slab = FootingSlab(B1, B2, rc_slab_flot);
vped = [rc_circ600_1, rc_circ600_2]
raft_flot = RaftFootingRect(vped, slab, Df)
fg = plot_footing_geom(raft_flot)
```


#### ULS bearing pressure 

```{julia}
res_bearing_flot = fraft_global_analysis(filepathname_flot, uls_cases, raft_flot, backfill, ψG=0.9, isZup=true, isFrustumVol=true,
    e_lim_11=0.9 * B1 / 2,
    e_lim_22=0.9 * B2 / 2)

calc_res_bearing_flot, diagram_bearing_flot = check_bearing_from_results(res_bearing_flot, raft_flot)
println(calc_res_bearing_flot.calc_details)
```

```{julia}
#| echo: false
diagram_bearing_flot
```

By inspection, the permissible bearing will be less than 100kPa, accept design.

#### Moment diagram (long direction)

```{julia}
calc_res_moment_flot, diagram_moment_flot = check_moment_diagram_from_results(res_bearing_flot, raft_flot, backfill; ψG=0.9, isFrustumVol=true, inc=0.05m, is_plot_all=false)
diagram_moment_flot
```

By inspection, design moment is less than capacity of slab, design OK.

#### Shear diagram

```{julia}
calc_res_shear_flot, diagram_shear_flot = check_shear_diagram_from_results(res_bearing_flot, raft_flot, backfill; ψG=0.9, isFrustumVol=true, inc=0.05m, is_plot_all=false)
diagram_shear_flot
```

```{julia}
Vu = 16kN
Mu = 10kNm
_, str_o = fdesign_beam_shear(rc_slab_flot, Vu, Mu, 0kN)
println(str_o)
```

#### Punching Shear

```{julia}
str_o = check_punching(raft_flot, uls_cases, ; isZup=true, filepathname=filepathname_flot)
println(str_o)
```

#### Punching Shear

```{julia}
str_o = check_punching(raft_flot, uls_cases, ; isZup=true, filepathname=filepathname_flot)
println(str_o)
```
